tasks.label: mcpreaper: bind reapy localhost 2306
args: $base='http://192.168.1.8:2307/_'; $set="$base/SET/EXTSTATE/reapy/server_port/2306"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $set -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3 | Out-Null; $act=((Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/GET/EXTSTATE/reapy/activate_reapy_server" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3).Content.Split("`t")[-1]).Trim(); if ($act.StartsWith('"') -and $act.EndsWith('"')) { $act=$act.Substring(1,$act.Length-2) }; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/$act" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3 | Out-Null; $port=((Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/GET/EXTSTATE/reapy/server_port" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3).Content.Split("`t")[-1]).Trim(); Write-Output "server_port=$port"
